name: Green Gage Plum Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (16 oz) green gage or purple plums
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the grape juice and mix it with the gelatin, adding the syrup from the plums, mashed plums, salt, and lemon juice.
2. Allow the mixture to cool.
3. Pour half of the gelatin mixture into a 1-1/2 quart mold and chill until firm.
4. When the remaining gelatin has thickened like raw egg white, beat in the cream cheese until frothy.
5. Pour the frothy mixture over the chilled gelatin and refrigerate until firm.
